items.title: Live markets: bitcoin retreats under $72,000 as Strategy unloads BTC for first time in four years
items.summary: Crypto markets continue to struggle even as risk markets across the globe surge higher.

items.title: Michael Saylor's Bitcoin Treasury Firm Strategy Sells 32 BTC for $2.5M
items.summary: Bitcoin tumbled to $72,000 Monday as news of the BTC treasury firm's about-face on its "never sell" stance broke.

items.title: Bitcoin below $72,000 as Strategy sold 32 bitcoin sale for $2.5 million in late May
items.summary: The 8-K filing Monday says proceeds from the May 26-31 sale, executed at an average price of $77,135 a coin, will fund distributions on Strategy's preferred stock.

items.title: Bitcoin ETPs post largest 2026 outflow as crypto funds bleed $1.67B
items.summary: Crypto ETPs see $1.67 billion in outflows as the US dominates selling, Bitcoin funds log a record 2026 exit, and altcoin participation narrows sharply across markets, according to CoinShares.

items.title: Bitcoin ETF Losses Near $3B Across 10 Days as YTD Flows Turn Negative
items.summary: U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs extended their outflow streak to 10 days, as crypto markets contend with multiple simultaneous headwinds.

items.title: Binance adds US stock trading in push beyond crypto
items.summary: Binance launched US equities trading for eligible users and plans tokenized stocks as crypto exchanges expand into broader financial markets.

items.title: ECB official says stablecoins risk importing old market flaws
items.summary: ECB board member Isabel Schnabel warned that stablecoins could bring money-market risks into tokenized finance and reinforce US dollar dominance.

items.title: Coinbase Launches Direct Indian Rupee Deposit and Withdrawal Rails
items.summary: The U.S. exchange has established direct rupee trading rails for Indian customers after securing regulatory clearance.

items.title: Cardano Summit 2026 canceled after community votes against Foundation funding proposal
items.summary: The Cardano Foundation's flagship conference was scrapped after a funding proposal failed to secure the two-thirds support required under the blockchain's new governance system.

items.title: Strategy holds STRC dividend at 11.5% for fourth straight month
items.summary: The preferred stock remains near its $100 par value as the company balances yield stability, ATM issuance capacity, and its bitcoin acquisition strategy.

items.title: Bitcoin, ether start June in the red while futures show taste for risk. XLM, HYPE gain
items.summary: Bitcoin and ether fell Monday after dropping in May, a month that usually sees them post positive returns. U.S. equity index futures rose.

items.title: Bitcoin and software stocks are breaking up — and history says a major crypto move is coming
items.summary: Bitcoin and software equities have sharply diverged after moving in lockstep for years, raising questions over whether bitcoin will eventually catch up.

items.title: What Is BChat? The Decentralized Messaging App Built for Privacy
items.summary: Built on the Beldex Network, BChat aims to solve the weaknesses of relying solely on end-to-end encryption (E2EE) for private messaging.

items.title: Coinbase launches rupee bank rails in India after FIU nod
items.summary: Coinbase has switched on direct rupee bank transfers in India via IMPS, letting users move funds between local bank accounts and the exchange for spot and futures trading.

items.title: Trump says Iran will ‘work out well’: Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
items.summary: Bitcoin price headed below $72,000 on Iran woes as US President Donald Trump told observers to "sit back and relax" with a ceasefire still unresolved.

items.title: Citi predicts the tokenized securities market will grow to $5.5 trillion by 2030
items.summary: Stablecoins alone will generate a demand for up to $1 trillion worth of onchain U.S. Treasury bills and $2.6 trillion for tokenized stocks, said Citi.

items.title: Whitehat developer unlocks $2 million stuck in a 2016 Ethereum ICO contract for nine years
items.summary: 0xflorent, a security researcher, found an integer-overflow flaw in the HongCoin token sale contract that lets the team unlock funds for 48 original investors. It is the second such recovery he has publicized in eight days.

items.title: Sui Foundation says ‘major upgrade’ fixed bugs behind three outages
items.summary: The Sui Network's first two outages were caused by bugs introduced in its 1.72 update, while an interim fix deployed to restore the blockchain triggered the third.
